question.content: Identify the biasing and load-path mistakes in subcircuits (a), (b), and (c), then output the corrective action for each one. Output exactly one ASCII line in the form a:<action>;b:<action>;c:<action>, using lowercase letters, underscores, colons, and semicolons only, no Chinese characters, no equation form, and no extra text.

step_1.content: Identify the biasing and load-path mistakes in each subcircuit (a), (b), and (c).
